blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path. You practiced the core loop many reliability teams use after a load test: reuse one UTC time range across k6 and **Explore**, compare external probes to generator metrics, classify errors in logs, then correlate traces from the k6 test result when [Grafana Cloud Traces integration](/docs/grafana-cloud/testing/k6/analyze-results/integration-with-grafana-cloud-traces/) is available—or document traces as a readiness gap.

You should now be able to:

- Explain why passing k6 thresholds alone is not a production guarantee
- Correlate k6 timing with synthetic metrics and application telemetry in one timeline
- Use the k6 **View Traces** workflow or record when server-side traces are not available on your stack
- Produce a short evidence-backed narrative for stakeholders
